description_for_human: Create and update HubSpot contacts and search deals from Microsoft 365 Copilot.
description_for_model: Plugin for managing HubSpot CRM data. Use this plugin to create new contacts, update existing contact properties, and search for deals by keyword.

functions.name: createContact
functions.description: Creates a new contact in HubSpot CRM. Requires first name, last name, and email.

functions.name: updateContact
functions.description: Updates properties on an existing HubSpot contact by contact ID.

functions.name: searchDeals
functions.description: Searches HubSpot deals by keyword. Returns deal name, amount, pipeline stage, and close date.
